tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_pipeline_ids_match_log
tests.trace:
log_text = 'Trial ID: composite_retriever_ts__CvE736o\nPolicies Pipeline ID: 7a8b978d-02be-4f7c-be81-e0be7dab5a6b\nFAQ Pipeline ID: 7a8b978d-02be-4f7c-be81-e0be7dab5a6b\n'
expected_names = {'faq': 'faq-composite_retriever_ts__CvE736o', 'policies': 'policies-composite_retriever_ts__CvE736o', 'retriever': 'composite-retriever-composite_retriever_ts__CvE736o'}

    def test_pipeline_ids_match_log(log_text, expected_names):
        pipelines = _list_pipelines()
        by_name = {p.get("name"): p.get("id") for p in pipelines}
    
        policies_log_match = re.search(
            r"^Policies Pipeline ID:\s*([A-Za-z0-9\-]+)\s*$", log_text, re.MULTILINE
        )
        faq_log_match = re.search(
            r"^FAQ Pipeline ID:\s*([A-Za-z0-9\-]+)\s*$", log_text, re.MULTILINE
        )
        assert policies_log_match and faq_log_match, (
            "Log file must contain both 'Policies Pipeline ID' and 'FAQ Pipeline ID' lines."
        )
    
        policies_logged_id = policies_log_match.group(1)
        faq_logged_id = faq_log_match.group(1)
    
>       assert by_name.get(expected_names["policies"]) == policies_logged_id, (
            f"Policies pipeline ID in log ({policies_logged_id}) does not match the LlamaCloud "
            f"pipeline ID for '{expected_names['policies']}' ({by_name.get(expected_names['policies'])})."
        )
E       AssertionError: Policies pipeline ID in log (7a8b978d-02be-4f7c-be81-e0be7dab5a6b) does not match the LlamaCloud pipeline ID for 'policies-composite_retriever_ts__CvE736o' (None).
E       assert None == '7a8b978d-02be-4f7c-be81-e0be7dab5a6b'
E        +  where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x720b22d1b400>('policies-composite_retriever_ts__CvE736o')
E        +    where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x720b22d1b400> = {'faq-composite_retriever_ts__Lz32jxt': '40e0c062-2355-49d5-9cea-809be3392f06', 'policies-composite_retriever_ts__Lz32...d-02be-4f7c-be81-e0be7dab5a6b', 'product-docs-composite_retriever_py__Z5tGTqF': '01bf56a0-e5a4-4e1f-8db4-1d0704aafca6'}.get
